source.title: Cancellation of Refund-Only Policy and Merchant Satisfaction Reform (2025-2026)

extractions.claim: China's SAMR summoned PDD executives and directed rectification of refund-only policy that 'squeezed merchant survival'
extractions.evidence: 市场监管总局约谈电商平台，针对'平台利用仅退款规则挤压商家生存空间、助长低质低价竞争'提出具体整改要求

verification.verifier_notes: SAMR intervention during 2025 NPC sessions. Regulatory pressure was key driver of industry-wide policy change.

extractions.claim: After refund-only policy cancellation (April 2025), Pinduoduo's malicious refund-only orders dropped 62% and merchant appeal success rate rose from 18% to 75%
extractions.evidence: 新规实施后，拼多多恶意仅退款订单下降62%，商家申诉成功率从18%上升至75%

verification.verifier_notes: Industry data cited in multiple Chinese media reports. Source of underlying data not specified — likely platform-disclosed.

extractions.claim: Refund-only complaints as share of merchant complaints fell from 50.4% (Q1 2025) to 35.9% (Q3) to 37.1% (Q4 2025) — improved but not eliminated
extractions.evidence: 仅退款投诉在商家投诉中的占比从Q1 2025的50.36%降至Q3的35.85%和Q4的37.09%

verification.verifier_notes: Clear improvement trend but issue persists. Abuse has been curbed but not eliminated.

extractions.claim: PDD pledged RMB 10B ($1.4B) in fee waivers, established Merchant Rights Protection Committee chaired by Co-CEO Zhao Jiazhen (Jan 2025)
extractions.evidence: Pinduoduo returned the 0.6% base technical service fee on refunded orders. Established 商家权益保护委员会 chaired by Co-CEO Zhao Jiazhen. Introduced 'abnormal order warnings' and 'low-price risk alerts.'

verification.verifier_notes: From SCMP and official PDD announcements. $1.4B fee waiver is material (~5% of 2024 revenue).

extractions.claim: Before reform, a survey of 2,000+ sellers found 8% experienced refund-only rates as high as 80% of orders; merchant appeal success rates were under 5% on Pinduoduo
extractions.evidence: 调查超2000名商家，7.9%的商家遭遇的仅退款率高达80%，仅1.06%表示从未遇到。拼多多商家申诉成功率不足5%。

verification.verifier_notes: Pre-reform survey data. The jump from <5% to 75% appeal success rate post-reform is dramatic.
